name: Hoppin'john Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Black-Eyed Peas, canned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients in the order listed.
2. Select white bread on your bread machine and press "Start".
3. Serve this delightful cholesterol-free, high-fiber bread on New Year's Eve instead of the traditional bowl of black-eyed peas believed to bring good fortune for the year ahead.
